name: Workable
description: Connect to Workable ATS to sync jobs, candidates, and pipeline stages into Shielva.

install_fields.label: API Token
install_fields.description: Your Workable API token. Found in Workable → Settings → Integrations → API Access Tokens.

install_fields.label: Workable Subdomain (e.g. mycompany)
install_fields.description: Your Workable account subdomain. If your Workable URL is mycompany.workable.com, enter 'mycompany'.
